root_text.an5.256:1.1: “Pañcime, bhikkhave, dhamme appahāya abhabbo paṭhamaṁ jhānaṁ upasampajja viharituṁ.
root_text.an5.256:1.4: Ime kho, bhikkhave, pañca dhamme appahāya abhabbo paṭhamaṁ jhānaṁ upasampajja viharituṁ.
root_text.an5.256:2.1: Pañcime, bhikkhave, dhamme pahāya bhabbo paṭhamaṁ jhānaṁ upasampajja viharituṁ.
root_text.an5.256:2.4: Ime kho, bhikkhave, pañca dhamme pahāya bhabbo paṭhamaṁ jhānaṁ upasampajja viharitun”ti.

translation_text.an5.256:1.1: “Mendicants, without giving up these five qualities you can’t enter and remain in the first absorption.
translation_text.an5.256:1.3: Stinginess with dwellings, families, material things, praise, and the teachings.
translation_text.an5.256:1.4: Without giving up these five qualities you can’t enter and remain in the first absorption.
translation_text.an5.256:2.1: But after giving up these five qualities you can enter and remain in the first absorption.
translation_text.an5.256:2.3: Stinginess with dwellings, families, material things, praise, and the teachings.
translation_text.an5.256:2.4: After giving up these five qualities you can enter and remain in the first absorption.”
